mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(CNTRPRTY_REMIT_REQ_CNT) as CNTRPRTY_REMIT_REQ_CNT FROM NF_REMIT_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND REMIT_DT = TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND TRAD_NO in ( SELECT TRAD_NO FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND (TRAD_REG_GB = #{tradRegGb}) AND TO_CHAR(INIT_REGIST_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') LIKE TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') )
with ur

SELECT SUM(CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_FAIL_CNT) as CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_FAIL_CNT FROM NF_REMIT_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND REMIT_DT = TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND TRAD_NO in ( SELECT TRAD_NO FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND (TRAD_REG_GB = #{tradRegGb}) AND TO_CHAR(INIT_REGIST_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') LIKE TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') )
with ur

SELECT count(*) CNT FROM NF_REMIT_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND REMIT_DT = TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND TRAD_NO in ( SELECT TRAD_NO FROM NF_TRADINFO_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND (TRAD_REG_GB = #{tradRegGb}) AND TO_CHAR(INIT_REGIST_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') LIKE TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') )
with ur

SELECT CUST_NO ,TRAD_NO ,REMIT_DT ,CNTRPRTY_ACCT_NO ,CNTRPRTY_CD ,CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_CD ,CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_FAIL_CNT ,LST_CHNG_DT ,CNTRPRTY_REMIT_REQ_CNT FROM NF_REMIT_MGT WHERE CUST_NO=#{custNo} AND TRAD_NO=#{tradNo} AND REMIT_DT = TO_CHAR(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AND LST_CHNG_DT BETWEEN CURRENT TIMESTAMP - 10 MINUTE AND TIMESTAMP(LST_CHNG_DT) ORDER BY LST_CHNG_DT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY WITH UR
mapper.update: UPDATE NF_REMIT_MGT SET CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_FAIL_CNT = CASE WHEN (SELECT CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_FAIL_CNT FROM NF_REMIT_MGT WHERE CUST_NO=#{custNo} and TRAD_NO=#{tradNo}) is null THEN 1 ELSE (CNTRPRTY_AUTHNT_FAIL_CNT + 1) END WHERE CUST_NO=#{custNo} AND TRAD_NO=#{tradNo}
